raw_text:
Om Bilaiya
linkedin.com/in/ombilaiya | ombilaiya01@gmail.com | [Mobile Number]
EXPERIENCE
Shwetansh Welfare and Educational Trust / Business Analyst 01/2025 – 04/2026

Executed data-driven process mapping for educational initiatives, identifying operational
bottlenecks and improving workflow efficiency by 15% through systematic resource
reallocation.

Collaborated with a remote cross-functional team to synthesize regional performance metrics,
delivering actionable insights that increased program outreach by 20%.

Leveraged SQL-based data retrieval to generate weekly reports on trust activities, reducing
manual reporting time by 10 hours per month for senior stakeholders.
ANTERIX Club, VIT Bhopal / Event Management Head 01/2024 – 04/2026

Directed a multi-disciplinary team of 15+ members to orchestrate high-impact technical
events, achieving a 95% student engagement rate across campus-wide initiatives.

Managed end-to-end event lifecycles and vendor relations, optimizing budget utilization by
12% through strategic resource planning and negotiation.

Implemented standardized event tracking protocols that reduced logistics-related errors by
30% compared to previous academic cycles.
VITera Club, VIT Bhopal / Co-Founder & Chairperson 01/2024 – 12/2025

Spearheaded the conceptualization and launch of a new technical club, successfully
onboarding 100+ active members within the first six months of operation.

Architected the club's organizational framework and strategic roadmap, securing university
approval and initial funding for three major technical workshops.

Mentored a core committee of 10 student leaders to establish a sustainable recruitment
pipeline, ensuring 100% continuity for future academic sessions.
PROJECTS
Impact of Generative AI on E-Commerce / Systematic Review 01/2025 – 03/2026

Synthesized complex data from 50+ peer-reviewed research papers to analyze the integration
of LLMs in retail environments, identifying 4 major risks in data privacy and bias.

Evaluated real-world automation use cases for the IEEE Conference Publication,
demonstrating a potential 40% reduction in customer service latency via AI implementation.

Authored a comprehensive technical analysis on hallucinations in Generative AI, providing
mitigation strategies adopted by the research team for future model evaluations.
Hostel Management System / Web-based Role Management Platform 01/2026 – 03/2026

Architected a full-stack role-based access system using Python and SQL, reducing manual
room allocation errors by 25% for a multi-user campus environment.

Engineered a real-time notice broadcasting and complaint tracking module, improving
communication response times by 50% between residents and administration.

Developed a secure night canteen ordering integration, processing 200+ daily transactions
with zero recorded downtime during peak campus hours.
College Event Registration & Payment Platform / Full-Stack Development 01/2024 –
06/2024

Built a centralized club event platform that replaced legacy Google Forms, increasing user
registration speed by 40% through streamlined UX design.

Integrated a secure QR-based payment verification flow, eliminating 100% of manual
verification fraud cases and securing ₹50,000+ in event revenue.

Teamed with a core development group to implement automated email confirmation triggers,
reducing administrative overhead by 15 hours per event cycle.
SKILLS

Programming Languages: Python, C++, Java, SQL

Data Science: Supervised Learning, Deep Learning, Neural Networks, Data Preprocessing,
Feature Engineering, Model Evaluation

Data Visualization: MATLAB (Data Plotting), Visual Dashboard Design

Databases: DBMS, SQL, Secure Access-Controlled Systems

Tools: Git/GitHub, AWS, OS, OOP, Computer Networks, QR Integration
EDUCATION

Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT) Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
Engineering (E-Commerce Technology) | 08/2023 – 05/2027

Indian Institute of Technology, Guwahati Credit-Linked Program in Artificial Intelligence
& Machine Learning | 2024
CERTIFICATIONS

AWS Solutions Architecture-Fourage-2024

Deep Learning-NPTEL-2024

Industrial IoT-University of Colorado Boulder-2024

Fundamentals of AI and ML-VITyarthi-2024

Python Essentials-VITyarthi-2024
